Trustworthy AI

We design mathematically grounded verification and runtime assurance techniques to guarantee the safety and correctness of AI-driven cyber-physical systems.

Explore Safety Engineering Methods

Safe LLM

We build compact, trustworthy, and domain-specialized language models with improved interpretability, alignment, and robust decision-making for safety-critical use.

Safe LLM Portfolio

Medical AI

Our work spans ophthalmology, clinical decision support, and noise-robust diagnosis, powered by domain-specialized LLMs for safer and more explainable medical intelligence.

View Medical AI Projects

Robot Racing

We explore autonomous racing, RoboRacer (F1TENTH) robotics, and safe high-speed navigation under real-world uncertainty, from simulation to physical track.

RoboRacer Lab

About Us

AiX Lab at Gyeongsang National University advances trustworthy AI through mathematically grounded verification, safe domain-specialized LLMs, clinically meaningful medical intelligence, and real-world autonomous racing platforms.

 Research

We study the safety, reliability, and performance of software and AI systems, from formal specifications to real-world deployments.

 Education

We teach AI, formal methods, and software engineering with hands-on labs, focusing on building trustworthy, system-level thinking.

 Development

We develop medical AI pipelines and autonomous driving stacks for real-world racing and clinical applications.

 Competition

We participate in F1TENTH, RoboRacer, and AI challenges, testing our ideas in competitive and realistic environments.

News

Recent updates from AiX Lab, including research progress, publications, conference activities, and people-related achievements.

AiX Lab – 학부연구생/석사/박사/석박통합 과정 모집 안내

Updated: 2025

AiX Lab은 학부연구생, 석사과정, 박사과정, 석·박 통합과정 지원자를 모집하고 있습니다.

주요 연구 분야는 Medical AI, Autonomous Driving (F1TENTH / RoboRacer), AI Safety & CPS Verification입니다.

자세한 모집 요강 및 지원 양식은 아래 페이지에서 확인하실 수 있습니다.

🔗 https://aix.gnu.ac.kr/join.html

F1Tenth Global Festa 2025 – 5위 수상

Dec 1–2, 2025

F1Tenth Global Festa 2025에 AiX Lab 대표로 전광석화 팀이 참가하여 5위를 수상했습니다.

자율주행 레이싱 플랫폼 F1TENTH를 활용한 글로벌 대회에서 우수한 성과를 거두었습니다.

NeurIPS 2025 – Conference Participation

Dec 2–7, 2025 · San Diego Convention Center

미국 샌디에이고에서 열린 NeurIPS 2025에 김진현, 조민아, 조은아가 참가했습니다.

LLM Safety, World Models, Medical AI 세션 및 워크숍에 집중 참여하며, 향후 연구 방향과 공동 연구 기회를 모색했습니다.

2025 – SCI(E) 논문 4편 게재 완료

2025

2025년에 총 4편의 SCI(E) 논문이 게재 또는 출판 승인되었습니다 (IEEE Access 2편, Scientific Reports 2편).

  • Soomin Cho, Inhye Kang, Kim, Jin Hyun.
    "From Timed Automata to Go: Formally Verified Code Generation and Runtime Monitoring for Cyber-Physical Systems."
    IEEE Access, 13:161729–161749, 2025. [PDF]
  • S. Baek, I. Lee, K. Jin Jang, Y. Han, and J. H. Kim.
    "Low-Cost and Fast Epiretinal Membrane Detection and Quantification Based on SD-OCT."
    IEEE Access, vol. 13, pp. 196887-196901, 2025. doi: 10.1109/ACCESS.2025.3629332. [PDF]
  • H. Yoon, E. Jo, S. Ryu, J.-I. Yoo, M. Kim, and J. H. Kim.
    "Noise-robust markerless video gait anomaly detection via two-stage acquisition and LSTM autoencoders."
    Scientific Reports, 15, 42074, 2025. doi: 10.1038/s41598-025-26169-9. [PDF]
  • M. Kwon, K. J. Jang, S. J. Baek, Y. S. Han, H. Choi, I. Lee, and J. H. Kim.
    "Ophtimus-V2-Tx: a compact domain-specific LLM for ophthalmic diagnosis and treatment planning."
    Scientific Reports, 15, 43532, 2025. doi: 10.1038/s41598-025-27410-1. [PDF]

Research Highlights

2025

AiX Lab은 Medical AI, Autonomous Driving, AI Safety & CPS Verification 분야에서 여러 연구 과제를 동시에 수행하고 있습니다.

RoboRacer (F1TENTH) 기반 자율주행 레이싱, 안과 영상 정량화, 포멀 메서드 기반 CPS 검증 및 코드 생성·모니터링 연구 등을 통해 이론과 실험을 함께 발전시키고 있습니다.

People & Alumni News

2025

  • 김지원 (Jiwon Kim) – 학부 연구생 졸업 (Undergraduate Research Assistant, Graduated)
    고려대 대학원 진학 후 삼성전자 (Samsung Electronics) 입사.
    Joined Samsung Electronics after entering Korea University Graduate School.
  • 권민욱 (Minwook Kwon) – 석사 졸업 (M.S., Aug. 2025)
    Public AI 입사 (AI Engineer).
    Joined Public AI as an AI Engineer.
  • 백승주 (Seungju Baek) – 석사 졸업 (M.S., Mar. 2025)
    Saltlux 합류, 재학 중 Ophtimus 안과 LLM 연구에 핵심 기여.
    Joined Saltlux, made key contributions to the Ophtimus ophthalmology LLM research during studies.

What Our Collaborators Say

We work closely with clinicians and autonomous driving researchers in Korea and abroad, turning theory into impactful systems.

“AiX Lab is one of our key partners in translating AI into clinically meaningful tools, especially in ophthalmology.”

Ophthalmology collaborators

“Within the F1TENTH and RoboRacer community in Korea, AiX Lab is widely recognized as a leading team in autonomous racing and safety.”

Autonomous driving collaborators

Contact Us

We are always open to collaboration and discussion. If you have questions about our research, education programs, or joint projects, please feel free to reach out.
